mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the CPI index above 250 signals rising inflation expectations, prompting the Federal Reserve to tighten monetary policy and depress equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous expansion in GDP growth (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) indicates robust economic activity, which drives corporate earnings and stock prices higher, resulting in positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint effect of GDPC1 and INDPRO on SPX returns shows a Rank IC < 0.05 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: In late-cycle expansion regimes characterized by low unemployment (UNRATE < 4%), strong labor market conditions drive corporate profit margins and stock valuations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns in low UNRATE regimes show no significant outperformance relative to baseline (t-test p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts (HOUST) above 1.3 million units signals strong consumer confidence and demand, which boosts corporate revenues and stock prices, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns in high HOUST regimes show no significant outperformance relative to baseline (t-test p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in consumer credit (RSAFS) below $495 billion indicates reduced household spending, which weakens corporate sales and depresses equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns in low RSAFS regimes show no significant underperformance relative to baseline (t-test p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) above 147,000 jobs signals strong labor market dynamics, which supports corporate earnings and stock prices, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns in high PAYEMS regimes show no significant outperformance relative to baseline (t-test p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained contraction in industrial production (INDPRO) below 106.4 signals weak manufacturing activity, which reduces corporate profits and depresses equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns in low INDPRO regimes show no significant underperformance relative to baseline (t-test p > 0.1).
